Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Important. 
A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE links in the References section.", "title": "Topic"}, {"category": "general", "text": "Red Hat multicluster global hub is a set of components that enable you to import one or more hub clusters and manage them from a single hub cluster.", "title": "Details"}, {"category": "legal_disclaimer", "text": "This content is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/).
